text:
Created attachment 253628
patch-x265-asm-warnings v1

My suggestion is:
1. Remove from Miakefile lines:
PATCH_SITES=   https://bitbucket.org/multicoreware/x265_git/commits/8f18e3ad32684eee95e885e718655f93951128c3/raw/
PATCHFILES+=   x265-asm-warnings.patch:-p1
2. Add multimedia/x265/files/patch-x265-asm-warnings.
